case_title: JACK SUMSKI DAB BAYSIDE MORTGAGE & LOAN vs. LOPEZ, KIELY P. et al

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT LOPEZ, KIELY P. ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT LOPEZ, KIELY P.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JACK SUMSKI DAB BAYSIDE MORTGAGE & LOAN SERVED MAY-20-1994, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ, KIELY P.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES FILED BY DEFENDANT LOPEZ, KIELY P. ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES

JUDGMENT IS REACHED BY STIPULATION. PLAINTIFF, JACK SUMSKI, IS AWARDED RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF 2130 HARRISON STREET, #13, SAN FRANCISCO. THE LEASE IN THIS MATTER IS FORFEITED. ALL PAST DUE RENTS ARE WAIVED. PLAINTIFF CAN RECOVER FOR DAMAGES OTHER THAN WEAR AND TEAR. DEFENDANT STATES SHE IS THE ONLY ADULT ON THE PREMISES. DEFENDANT SHALL INDEMNIFY PLAINTIFF FOR ANY CLAIM RELATED TO A RIGHT OF POSSESSION. THIS INDEMNIFICATION SHALL INCLUDE BUT NOT BE LIMITED TO ATTORNEY'S FEES AND COSTS. EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION SHALL BE STAYED UNTIL 7-15-94, 5PM. THERE WILL BE NO STAYS BEYOND THIS DATE. IF DEFENDANT VACATES BEFORE 7-15-94, PLAINTIFF SHALL VACATE JUDGEMENT. ANY ITEMS LEFT ON THE PREMISES AFTER 7-L5-94, 5PM, SHALL BECOME THE PROPERTY OF THE LANDLORD. THERE WILL BE A MUTUAL RELEASE OF CLAIMS. EACH SIDE SHALL PAY THEIR OWN ATTORNEY'S FEES. PLAINTIFF SHALL PREPARE JUDGEMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LOPEZ, KIELY P. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2130 HARRISON STREET #13, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA, STAYED UNTIL JUL-15-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JACK SUMSKI DAB BAYSIDE MORTGAGE & LOAN AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ, KIELY P. DOES 1 THROUGH 10 SUMMONS ISSUED
